Overrides.Override: Spells deal added Chaos Damage equal to 2% of your maximum Life Spells Cost +8% of Life Limited to 1 Runegraft of the Witchmark
15% increased Reservation Efficiency of Skills Auras from your Skills which affect Allies also affect Enemies Limited to 1 Runegraft of Treachery
Fire at most 1 Projectile Projectiles Fork Projectiles Chain an additional time Limited to 1 Runegraft of Refraction
Trigger level 1 Summon Spirit of Kiloava Skill when you Block Damage from a Unique Enemy Limited to 1 Loyalty Tattoo
Your Lucky or Unlucky effects are instead Unexciting Limited to 1 Runegraft of Stability
